ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose vault folders to exclude. Confirming will remove existing embeddings for that folder.
ast.target: 选择要排除的保险库文件夹。确认将删除该文件夹的现有嵌入。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Skip files shorter than this character count
ast.target: 跳过字符数少于此阈值的文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated file name patterns to exclude
ast.target: 用逗号分隔的文件名模式以排除

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 逗号分隔的标题模式，需跳过

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Embed individual sections for more granular connections
ast.target: 嵌入单独章节，以实现更细粒度的关联

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Skip blocks shorter than this character count
ast.target: 跳过字符数少于此阈值的块

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Split blocks at heading levels up to this depth (1=h1 only, 6=all headings). H4+ headings merge into their parent block at the default of 3.
ast.target: 在指定深度的标题级别拆分块（1=仅h1，6=所有标题）。默认情况下，H4 及以上的标题会合并到其父块（深度3）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Skip re-embedding when content change is smaller than this (chars). Saves API costs on trivial edits.
ast.target: 当内容变更小于此字符数时跳过重新嵌入，可节省微小编辑的 API 成本

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Save progress every n batches. Lower = safer on crash, higher = less disk i/o
ast.target: 每 n 批次保存一次进度。数值越小在崩溃时越安全，数值越大则磁盘 I/O 更少

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of batches sent to the API simultaneously. Lower if hitting rate limits.
ast.target: 同时发送到 API 的批次数量。若触发速率限制，请调低该值

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Files processed per chunk during vault discovery. Lower = smoother UI, higher = faster.
ast.target: 在库扫描期间每个块处理的文件数。数值越低 UI 越流畅，数值越高速度越快

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 相似度高于此分数的结果将使用你的强调色高亮显示

ast.name: description
ast.source: Run semantic note search against the current vault and return note-level matches.
ast.target: 对当前库进行语义笔记搜索并返回笔记级匹配。

ast.source: Read the full markdown contents of a note by its vault-relative path.

    plugin.notices.show("failed_load_collection_data")
